legacy.content:
# Phase 17-01 Plan
## Objective
Lock implementation contract for content expansion + long-run balancing loops.
## Tasks
1. Add schema entries and baseline data packs for quests/events/dialogue depth growth. 2. Implement long-run deterministic simulation suite (100/250/500 turns). 3. Emit balance artifacts (usage distribution, archetype spread, survival rates, dead-content report). 4. Validate pressure/perf budgets under expanded entity/content load. 5. Update planning and GRD summaries with outcomes and tuning actions.
## Verification
- Package build + replay smoke + balance harness pass. - Docs unit tests + `/play` e2e pass. - Long-run suite reports generated and archived.
